flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Dickinson College rose 19% between 2006 and 2009 ($33.8k → $40.1k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Dickinson College fell 14% between 2021 and 2024 (78.6% → 67.8%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Dickinson College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($58.7k → $65.7k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Dickinson College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.3% → 0.0%).
